title: Unmasker
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Unmasker |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Sharp-[[Tooth/Legends|toothed]] *Ill-tempered |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivorous]]Since ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' has the unmaskers with sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], and has the unmasker shake the [[ooglith masquer]] around "as if it were a slab of meat," this article assumes that unmaskers are carnivorous in [[Diet/Legends|diet]]. |language= }} {{Quote|What do you think of the unmasker?''"
"''I'll say this much, you don't make many mistakes.|Peace Brigadier [[Reck Desh]] and Han Solo|}} '''Unmaskers''' were [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] creatures used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to scare [[ooglith masquer]]s and cause them to reveal the identities of their wearers. Unmaskers were ill-tempered, had sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], and resembled a cross between a [[Ng'ok/Legends|ng'ok]] and a [[quillarat]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], one was used by members of the [[Peace Brigade]] to identify the Yuuzhan Vong [[Priestess/Legends|Priestess]] [[Elan]] aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Queen of Empire]]''. ==Biology and appearance== Unmaskers were small creatures, able to fit into a case that could be carried by the average [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]. They had a bristly neck, as well as razor-sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], and resembled the offspring of a [[Ng'ok/Legends|ng'ok]] and a [[quillarat]], both creatures themselves.{{Film|IV}}''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' Unmaskers also had an [[Nose/Legends|olfactory]] organ. The creature was not immune to the affects of [[bo'tous]], a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] biological weapon. ==Behavior== {{Quote|That's the thing about ooglith masquers, they're as easy to intimidate as...|Reck Desh, after an unmasker scares a ooglith masquer|}} Classified as [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], unmaskers had an ill temper. Their appearance would frighten [[ooglith masquer]]s, which were Yuuzhan Vong biotechnological bodysuits used to disguise the wearer. When ooglith masquers fled from them, some unmaskers would go after the other creature with a vengeance and would shake the masquer around after catching it in its teeth. Despite their temperament, unmaskers were looked after by Yuuzhan Vong minders and would allow themselves to be transported around inside a case; they were frequently carried around by their minders to scare ooglith masquers. However, unmaskers would occasionally leap from their minder's [[Limb/Legends|arms]] to pursue fleeing ooglith masquers. Unmaskers were carnivorous in [[Diet/Legends|diet]]. ==History== [[File:Elan-HerosTrial.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Elan killed an unmasker after her feigned defection was discovered.]] In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] other than their [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|own]], and waged war on the inhabitants. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Priest/Legends|priestess]] [[Elan]] seemingly defected to the side of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], which was fighting the invaders. The priestess was taken into protective custody by the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]], and shortly after was transported aboard the aging [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' to get her to a safe location. However, members of the Yuuzhan Vong–allied [[Peace Brigade]] boarded the liner, in order to rescue Elan. The group brought aboard an unmasker and its minder in order to help them locate the priestess, eventually finding a suspicious gang of individuals including former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The Peace Brigadiers used the unmasker to scare the ooglith masquer that was disguising Elan, who was among the individuals, thus revealing the priestess. In reality, Elan had actually only feigned defection so she could get close to members of the [[New Jedi Order]] and [[Death/Legends|kill]] them. The priestess was later forced to slay her rescuers, along with the unmasker, after the Peace Brigadiers took her with them. ==Behind the scenes== Unmaskers appeared in the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'', written by [[James Luceno]], released as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Carnivorous creatures]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong creatures]]
